data.title: implementation-plan SKILL.md post-rendering integration (last hook)
data.description:
As a DSO agent running /dso:implementation-plan, I can see generated tasks annotated with reference citations when ref-library-loader.sh is available.

Done definitions:
- implementation-plan SKILL.md task-generation step calls ref-library-loader.sh AFTER task title+description template rendering completes (no unrendered template variables passed to loader)
- ref-library-loader.sh runs as the LAST post-render step before task persistence (ordinal position documented; after approach-decision-maker, ui-designer payloads, testing_mode classification)
- ref-library-loader.sh output (citation annotations) appended to task description
- Failure in ref-library-loader.sh does NOT block task generation (fail-open)
- Flag-off mode skips ref-library-loader call entirely
- Integration test verifies annotation appears in generated task

Considerations:
- [Reliability] Fail-open behavior matches dso convention (partial degradation preferred over hard failure)
- [Integration] Hook point in implementation-plan must not interleave with template rendering; last-before-persistence position prevents later hooks from parsing task description with regex expectations that break on appended citations
